title: tml.json
description: Declarative configuration for tml (thank-me-later). Knobs only — pipeline behavior lives in plugins. JSON may toggle and select; reshaping the pipeline (insert/replace/reorder) is a plugin's job.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema, for editor autocomplete and validation.

harness.description: Harness Provider that runs agent tasks, by registered name. Default: "pi".

gitProvider.description: Git provider for the code host (PRs, CI), by registered name. Default: "github".

branch.description: How the branch Step gets a feature branch when you aren't on one. Default: "ai".

maxFixAttempts.description: Maximum automatic fix attempts per round-loop Step. Default: 3.

models.description: Per-Step model overrides, keyed by Step name; the reserved key "default" is the run-wide floor. Values are raw, harness-specific model ids.

disable.description: Names of pipeline Steps to remove. JSON may only disable a known Step; reordering or adding Steps is a plugin.

plugins.description: Local paths ("./…", "../…", or absolute) to plugin files. Each must `export default (tml) => { … }` and never import @tml/core. Remote/published plugins are not supported yet.
